types.pitch: SubDraw gives you a complete audit trail for every draw your GC borrowers submit — approved amounts, supporting docs, lien waivers, and payment status. No more chasing GCs for draw packages. Your GC clients submit lender-ready documentation automatically.
types.pain_point: GC borrowers submitting incomplete draw packages, missing lien waivers, and disorganized documentation that delays funding

types.pitch: SubDraw collects and stores all lien waivers, invoices, and payment documentation directly from subcontractors. When your GC clients close, their documentation is complete — not assembled at the last minute from email threads.
types.pain_point: Missing lien waivers and incomplete payment documentation from GC clients at closing

types.pitch: SubDraw gives your GC clients a complete payment audit trail — every pay application, approval, retainage calculation, and change order documented. Cleaner job costing data, automatic retainage tracking, and exportable records for tax season.
types.pain_point: GC clients with messy job costing records, manual retainage calculations, and no documentation trail for subcontractor payments

types.pitch: GCs using SubDraw have documented proof of controlled subcontract billing, retainage management, and payment history. That's the kind of organized operation that gets better bond terms.
types.pain_point: GC clients lacking documentation and payment controls that underwriters want to see

partner_icp.referral_offer: Your GC clients get their first month free. You get recognized as the referral source in their account.
